TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuamanges ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 42 buwan, 96 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 94 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 96%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjuamanges hya' ga Tjuabal. tay 'llaw na Tjuamanges hya' ga Tjuavanaq. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuamanges ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjuamanges ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuamaŋes~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na tjuamaŋes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tjuaβal. taj ʔllaw na tjuamaŋes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tjua*anaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuamaŋes~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjuamaŋes~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjuamanges ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 42 buwan, 96 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 94 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 96%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjuamanges hya' ga Tjuabal. tay 'llaw na Tjuamanges hya' ga Tjuavanaq. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuamanges ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjuamanges ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuamaŋes~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na tjuamaŋes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tjuaβal. taj ʔllaw na tjuamaŋes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tjua*anaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuamaŋes~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjuamaŋes~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
